items.title: Communications and Public Affairs | DARPA
items.content_text: Our Public Affairs team is the sole point of contact for media inquiries about the agency, our programs, and our personnel. We lead all external communications and outreach, ensuring that publicly released information complies with Department of War and DARPA policy.

items.title: Features | DARPA
items.content_text: The history of technology is a rich story with individual, institutional, corporate, and governmental protagonists driven by necessity, the pursuit of fame and fortune, and visions of becoming more powerful actors in the world.

items.title: Voices from DARPA Podcast | DARPA
items.content_text: The Accidental Chemist | Ep 95

items.title: Public Release
items.content_text: All Department of War unclassified information (such as papers, presentations, videos, images, news releases, etc.) must undergo a security and policy review before it is publicly released.

items.title: Images library | DARPA
items.content_text: For select initiatives, we provide high-resolution images for the media and government agencies. All images must be properly credited.

items.title: Case Studies | DARPA
items.content_text: Case Studies | DARPA

items.title: From bomb‑proof pants to laser weapons: 25 years of Dstl
items.content_text: Dstl this week marks 25 years at the heart of the UK’s defence and national security, delivering science and technology advantage that keeps the country safe.

items.title: New world-leading lab to be built at secretive UK research site
items.content_text: Expert UK scientists working on the most innovative defence technologies will be backed by £580 million of infrastructure funding over the next four years, including to build a new world-leading new laboratory and expand their research.

items.title: UK accelerates long-range strike capability for Ukraine
items.content_text: Three UK-designed long-range strike systems have been flight tested just months after competition launch, as British defence industry deliver battlefield capability at record speed

items.title: Honours recognition for Dstl personnel
items.content_text: Advances in submarine and missile developments are among the achievements of Dstl staff in the latest Honours.

items.title: Dstl achieves UK’s first optical downlink from space
items.content_text: A demonstration of laser technology has paved the way for a transformational leap in faster and more secure communications for the UK’s armed forces.

items.title: New and novel: call for multi-domain autonomous systems
items.content_text: Dstl seeks early-stage novel and disruptive science and technology to advance defence robotics and autonomous systems
